product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I'm very interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have listed. It looks like a fantastic TV! I was wondering if there's any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV! It's a top-of-the-line model with amazing features. While I can't go below the wholesale price, I can offer you a competitive deal.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That sounds promising! I'm definitely interested. What's the best price you can offer me for it today?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I can offer you a special price of $1,500 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV today. It's a great deal considering all the advanced features it offers. What do you think?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: $1,500 is a bit more than I was hoping to spend. I appreciate the offer, but I'm afraid I can't quite stretch my budget to that. Would you be able to do any better on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget concerns. How about I offer you a discounted price of $1,400 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV? It's the best I can do without going below the wholesale price. Let me know if this works for you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: That's a fantastic offer! $1,400 works for me. I'll take it.
